title: The Defense News: 북한 통합 타격 시스템 시험 — 화성-11 집속탄·블랙아웃탄·전자기무기 조합
snippet: Detailed technical analysis of the coordinated strike systems. Carbon-fiber blackout munition spreads conductive filaments over high-voltage equipment causing short circuits. EMP weapon uses high-power microwave beams to damage or disrupt electronics. Real battlefield performance depends on guidance accuracy, fuse reliability, dud rates, electromagnetic output, target shielding.
tag_reason: 4/11 보고서의 무기시험을 기술적 제한사항(정밀도, 신관 신뢰성, 불발률, 차폐) 관점에서 분석한 새로운 전문 기사. 이전 소스에 없음.
